name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who will not install Interceptly / MeetAlfred / Dripify / Waalaxy. Plans multi-touch campaigns against a client-supplied ICP and saved Sales Navigator search, executes the daily outreach loop directly in Sales Nav via Chrome MCP, and keeps all state in a single workbook inside /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day + 100/week connection cap across campaigns, routes every reply through rockstarr-reply for approval, and confirms the browser is signed in to the correct LinkedIn before every run.
